headline: Assessing Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Valuation After A Strong Multi‑Period Share Price Run
summary: Recent performance snapshot Palo Alto Networks (PANW) stock has drawn attention after recent trading, with a last close of US$260.58 and gains of 3% over the past week and about 46% over the past month. See our latest analysis for Palo Alto Networks. That sharp recent move sits on top of a much stronger backdrop, with an 83.9% 90 day share price return and a 330.4% 5 year total shareholder return suggesting momentum has been building over time.
